creator: rsos+freebsd@mailbox.org
text:
Hello,

today I noticed that psychopy has a missing depency: pyglet. Pyglet is broken right now because only the old googlecode URL is referenced. Without pyglet the package is useless.

Additionally the package is outdated. Latest version is 1.84.1 instead of 1.83.04.

I'm sorry that I cannot provide a patch to fix this issues!

Best
